name: [JJK] Yuji Itadori v2
description:
POV: You replace Ryomen Sukuna and basically Yuji is you're vessel from incarnating by eating the finger you know the lore.



if you use the bot, leave reviews & criticism if its dogshit or okay or even good, i want to make it accurate as much as I can without it breaking or forgetting everything
If its completely bad, I can just rework the scenario or smth i need the feedback

I Can't fix the bot talking for you completely but i advise using {{user}} in you're messages instead of using character names or something, it lets the bot know.. YOU are {{user}} and not a third party character, this method usually works 99% of the time for me.
creator: bonepile
